query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'parceiros' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%nom%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'parceiros' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%razao%')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'parceiros' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%nom%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'parceiros' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%razao%')
